item1_structural.ip_ownership: Parent owns all IP; licenses to franchisor via perpetual license (Jan 4, 2022)
item1_structural.license_termination_risk: Parent can terminate on 90 days (breach) or 6 months (no-cause) notice
item1_structural.franchise_model: Conversion only — existing hotel operators rebrand to Magnuson
item1_structural.brand_differentiation: Magnuson Grand for hotels with restaurants/spa/convention centers; Magnuson Hotels for standard properties
item1_structural.affiliate_hotels: Magnuson Company operates Affiliate Hotels (non-franchise marketing services) that compete with Branded Hotels

item6_fee_attributes.technology_fee_detail: Approved PMS Connection $300-$2,000/yr if not using Magnuson Cloud PMS
item6_fee_attributes.distribution_channel_control: Franchisor controls all OTA/GDS listings; 10-20% channel fees passed to franchisee
fee_escalation_provisions: Minimum invoice revenue: up to 10%/year compounding
Extended closure fee: up to 10%/year compounding

related_party_transactions.description: Administrative services performed by parent on company's behalf
Non-exclusive license for Magnuson brand (99-year term). No license fee charged in any period.
